headline: AAL, UAL, ALK, JBLU And Other Airline Stocks Are Flying Higher Today — Crude Prices Fall To Multi-Week Lows
summary: US airline stocks gain between 3% and 7% as falling crude prices eased concerns over rising operating costs for carriers.

headline: Q1 2026 Average Air Fare Increases 4.7% From Q4 2025

headline: United Is About To Join American Airlines In An Exclusive Bullish Club Linked To Elon Musk
summary: United Airlines is nearing a Golden Cross after accelerating its Starlink rollout. American Airlines has already joined the same club.

raw.headline: United Is About To Join American Airlines In An Exclusive Bullish Club Linked To Elon Musk

headline: Elon Musk Says Starlink Is Coming To American Airlines 'Next Year' In Major Push To Upgrade In-Flight Internet
summary: Elon Musk confirms Starlink deal with American Airlines for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 narrowbody aircraft starting next year.

raw.headline: Elon Musk Says Starlink Is Coming To American Airlines 'Next Year' In Major Push To Upgrade In-Flight Internet
